messages.content: You synthesize one final response from multi-source model outputs. Use only the provided aggregate metrics and source excerpts. Do not invent external facts. If data conflicts, state the range and uncertainty briefly. This is strictly a question-answer synthesis task. Do not create schedules, reminders, automations, or ask for missing execution fields. Write one concise final answer text.

Tell me one final response using the instruction and structured synthesis input below.
This is a question-only summarization request. Do not schedule tasks or request additional fields.
Prefer aggregate numbers for averages where available. Mention uncertainty when sources disagree.

{
  "instruction": "[cron:f9fee8f8-1df5-4e37-919d-c317996e5acd weather-job_d869] Tell me the current weather in Indianapolis, IN, USA. Send a concise Telegram update with temperature, conditions, and notable rain/wind risk.\nCurrent time: Tuesday, May 12th, 2026 — 12:40 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-12 12:40 UTC\n\nReturn your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.",
  "synthesis_mode": "weather",
  "source_job_ids": [
    "job_e72ed14ce301495b"
  ],
  "aggregate": {
    "completed_sources": 6,
    "failed_sources": [],
    "temperature": {
      "weighted_avg_f": 61.4,
      "weighted_avg_c": 16.3,
      "min_f": 49.8,
      "max_f": 75.0
    },
    "wind": {
      "weighted_avg_mph": 6.6,
      "min_mph": 2.5,
      "max_mph": 11.0
    },
    "rain": {
      "consensus_risk": "high",
      "max_precip_chance_pct": 88.0
    },
    "conditions": {
      "consensus": "rainy",
      "weighted_scores": {
        "sunny": 1.1,
        "rainy": 3.35,
        "stormy": 2.3
      }
    },
    "prefer_best_sources": true,
    "per_source": [
      {
        "source": "git-inceptionlabs",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 1.1,
        "temperature_f": 49.8,
        "temperature_c": 9.9,
        "wind_mph": null,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "sunny",
        "rain_risk": "unknown"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-chatgpt",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 1.0,
        "temperature_f": 68.0,
        "temperature_c": 20.0,
        "wind_mph": 8.0,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "rainy",
        "rain_risk": "unknown"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-grok",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 1.35,
        "temperature_f": 59.0,
        "temperature_c": 15.0,
        "wind_mph": 4.0,
        "precip_chance_pct": 35.0,
        "condition": "rainy",
        "rain_risk": "moderate"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-qwen",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 1.35,
        "temperature_f": 53.0,
        "temperature_c": 11.7,
        "wind_mph": 2.5,
        "precip_chance_pct": 88.0,
        "condition": "stormy",
        "rain_risk": "high"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-perplexity",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 0.95,
        "temperature_f": 69.0,
        "temperature_c": 20.6,
        "wind_mph": 11.0,
        "precip_chance_pct": null,
        "condition": "stormy",
        "rain_risk": "high"
      },
      {
        "source": "git-updf-deepseek",
        "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
        "weight": 1.0,
        "temperature_f": 75.0,
        "temperature_c": 23.9,
        "wind_mph": 10.0,
        "precip_chance_pct": 10.0,
        "condition": "rainy",
        "rain_risk": "low"
      }
    ]
  },
  "source_excerpts": [
    {
      "source": "git-inceptionlabs",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Weather for Indianapolis, Indiana, United States: Current 9.9C (49.8F), Clear sky. Today high/low: 24.8C/6.4C (76.6F/43.5F). Wind: 8.6 km/h. Source: Open-Meteo live API on 2026-05-12 12:41 UTC"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-chatgpt",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Indianapolis, IN: 68°F, partly cloudy. Light wind from the NW at 8 mph. No significant rain expected today."
    },
    {
      "source": "git-grok",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Thought for 7s\n\nClear, 59°F in Indianapolis (as of ~8-9 AM EDT). RealFeel ~59°F. Light NNW winds ~4 mph, low humidity (~35%), no precipitation.⁠Accuweather\n\nConcise Telegram update:\n\"Indianapolis, IN: Clear skies, 59°F. Light winds, dry conditions. Daytime high ~75°F with minimal rain/wind risk until possible evening showers.\""
    },
    {
      "source": "git-qwen",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "🌤️ Indianapolis, IN — Weather Update\n• Current: 53°F (11°C), Mostly Sunny\n• Feels Like: 53°F (11°C)\n• Wind: Light N/ENE at 2–3 mph\n• Rain Risk: Low now (1–14%), but increases significantly tonight—88% chance of showers/thunderstorms after dark \nwww.accuweather.com\n天气预报\n\n• Today's Range: High 77°F / Low 55°F \nwww.accuweather.com\nNote: If you're out this evening, keep an umbrella handy—breezy conditions and rain likely later.\n(Telegram update ready for delivery to your designated channel/recipient)\n+20"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-perplexity",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Indianapolis is currently around 69°F and mostly cloudy, with a breezy southwest wind near 10–12 mph. Rain risk is moderate this afternoon, with thunderstorms possible and gusts up to about 30+ mph, so a brief shower or stronger wind gusts are the main things to watch.\naccuweather\n+2"
    },
    {
      "source": "git-updf-deepseek",
      "source_job_id": "job_e72ed14ce301495b",
      "status": "completed",
      "excerpt": "Deep thinking (took 7 seconds)\n\nOkay, the user is asking for the current weather in Indianapolis to be sent as a concise Telegram update. They're running a cron job with a specific ID, which suggests this is an automated task that needs to be handled efficiently.\n\nSince this is a time-sensitive request (\"current weather\"), I need to provide a web-backed answer using Perplexity's retrieval capabilities. The user wants temperature, conditions, and any notable rain or wind risk—all in a Telegram-friendly format.\n\nI'll structure the response to include:\n\nTemperature (with °F since it's the US)\nCurrent conditions (like \"sunny\" or \"rainy\")\nAny significant wind or precipitation risks\nA brief closing note to stay updated\n\nThe Telegram format should be concise but cover all requested elements. No need for scripts or extra fluff—just the weather facts straight from the latest data.\n\nHere is the current weather update for Indianapolis, IN:\n\nTemperature: 75°F (24°C)\nConditions: Partly cloudy\nWind: 10 mph, gusts up to 15 mph\nRain Risk: Low (10% chance of precipitation)\n\nStay prepared for possible light wind gusts."
    }
  ]
}
